events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Scenario: respirator wrong cartridge color (ID). Work rough-complete. PPE selection. Need assess compliance with NFPA 70E, OSHA 1910 Subpart I. Wrong cartridge color means incorrect respirator cartridge for hazard, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? Wrong respirator cartridge can lead to exposure to hazardous atmosphere; in heavy industrial could be critical. But maybe high. Need choose. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound source etc default empty string/0. Workable empty. Findings: respirator equipped with wrong cartridge color/ID for identified contaminant; not providing required protection. Actions: remove from service, replace with correct NIOSH-approved cartridge per hazard assessment and manufacturer, retrain, verify fit and seal. Rationale: OSHA 1910.134 requires respirators selected based on respiratory hazard and cartridge appropriate; wrong color indicates wrong protection. NFPA 70E maybe PPE selection for electrical hazards but respirator not relevant; but reference includes NFPA 70E. We can mention OSHA 1910.134 and 1910.132. Confidence 0.95. Event_time 0.0. Rate 0.0. Order empty. Workable empty. Need valid JSON. Ensure no prose outside.
